mapper.select:
SELECT CAST(tag.id AS text) AS id, tag.code, (tag.is_active AND tag.is_selectable AND tag.tag_type = 'TAG') AS active_selectable, coalesce(statistic.preference_discrimination, 0.5) AS preference_discrimination, CAST(serving_run.id AS text) AS tag_statistic_run_id FROM preference.preference_tags tag LEFT JOIN preference.tag_statistic_runs serving_run ON serving_run.is_serving = true LEFT JOIN preference.tag_statistics statistic ON statistic.run_id = serving_run.id AND statistic.tag_id = tag.id WHERE tag.code IN
#{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preference.place_tag_enrichments ( id, provider, external_place_id, source_modified_at, source_hash, status, model_provider, model_name, prompt_version, tag_dictionary_version, selection_policy_version, tag_statistic_run_id, candidate_count, selected_count, enriched_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), #{provider}, #{externalPlaceId}, #{sourceModifiedAt}, #{sourceHash}, #{status}, #{modelProvider}, #{modelName}, #{promptVersion}, #{tagDictionaryVersion}, #{selectionPolicyVersion}, CAST(#{tagStatisticRunId} AS uuid), #{candidateCount}, #{selectedCount}, now() )

INSERT INTO preference.place_tag_enrichment_candidates ( id, enrichment_id, candidate_code, matched_tag_id, confidence, weight, selection_score, status, rationale ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{enrichmentId} AS uuid), #{candidateCode}, CAST(#{matchedTagId} AS uuid), #{confidence}, #{weight}, #{selectionScore}, #{status}, #{rationale} )

INSERT INTO preference.place_tag_enrichment_tags ( enrichment_id, tag_id, confidence, weight, preference_discrimination_snapshot, selection_score, rank_order, tag_statistic_run_id, rationale ) VALUES ( CAST(#{enrichmentId} AS uuid), CAST(#{tagId} AS uuid), #{confidence}, #{weight}, #{preferenceDiscriminationSnapshot}, #{selectionScore}, #{rankOrder}, CAST(#{tagStatisticRunId} AS uuid), #{rationale} )
